test_cases.name: create_author_with_all_fields
test_cases.description: Verifies that an author can be created with all fields (name, bio, born_year)

test_cases.name: create_author_missing_optional_fields
test_cases.description: Verifies that an author can be created with only required fields (name)

test_cases.name: create_author_with_invalid_name_length
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating an author with name length outside 1-100 characters returns validation error

test_cases.name: list_authors_with_pagination
test_cases.description: Verifies that authors can be listed with pagination parameters (skip, limit)

test_cases.name: list_authors_empty_database
test_cases.description: Verifies that an empty list is returned when no authors exist

test_cases.name: get_author_by_id
test_cases.description: Verifies that an existing author can be retrieved by ID

test_cases.name: get_author_with_if_none_match_etag_match
test_cases.description: Verifies that 304 Not Modified is returned when If-None-Match ETag matches

test_cases.name: get_nonexistent_author
test_cases.description: Verifies that 404 is returned when trying to get a non-existent author

test_cases.name: update_author_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that an author can be updated with valid data

test_cases.name: update_author_with_if_match_etag_mismatch
test_cases.description: Verifies that 412 Precondition Failed is returned when If-Match ETag doesn't match

test_cases.name: delete_author_without_books
test_cases.description: Verifies that an author without associated books can be deleted

test_cases.name: delete_author_with_associated_books
test_cases.description: Verifies that 409 Conflict is returned when trying to delete an author with associated books

test_cases.name: create_category_with_unique_name
test_cases.description: Verifies that a category can be created with a unique name

test_cases.name: create_category_with_duplicate_name
test_cases.description: Verifies that 409 Conflict is returned when trying to create a category with a duplicate name

test_cases.name: create_book_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that a book can be created with all required fields and valid data

test_cases.name: create_book_with_duplicate_isbn
test_cases.description: Verifies that 409 Conflict is returned when trying to create a book with a duplicate ISBN

test_cases.name: create_book_with_invalid_isbn_length
test_cases.description: Verifies that 422 is returned when trying to create a book with ISBN length outside 10-13 characters

test_cases.name: list_books_with_pagination_and_filters
test_cases.description: Verifies that books can be listed with pagination and filters (search, author_id, category_id, min_price, max_price)

test_cases.name: list_books_with_invalid_page_size
test_cases.description: Verifies that 422 is returned when page_size is outside 1-100 range

test_cases.name: get_book_by_id
test_cases.description: Verifies that an existing book can be retrieved by ID

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that 410 Gone is returned when trying to get a soft-deleted book

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_eligible_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that discount can be applied to a book published more than 1 year ago

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_new_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that 400 Bad Request is returned when trying to apply discount to a book published less than 1 year ago

test_cases.name: apply_discount_exceeding_rate_limit
test_cases.description: Verifies that 429 Too Many Requests is returned when exceeding the rate limit (5 requests/10 seconds)

test_cases.name: update_book_stock_with_valid_quantity
test_cases.description: Verifies that book stock can be updated with a valid quantity

test_cases.name: update_book_stock_resulting_in_negative_stock
test_cases.description: Verifies that 400 Bad Request is returned when trying to update stock resulting in negative stock

test_cases.name: upload_valid_cover_image
test_cases.description: Verifies that a valid cover image (JPEG/PNG, <2MB) can be uploaded

test_cases.name: upload_unsupported_cover_image_type
test_cases.description: Verifies that 415 Unsupported Media Type is returned when uploading an unsupported file type

test_cases.name: upload_oversized_cover_image
test_cases.description: Verifies that 413 Content Too Large is returned when uploading a file larger than 2MB

test_cases.name: create_review_for_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that a review can be created for a book with valid data
